info.name: Delivery System API
info.description:
REST API for the delivery-system backend (Spring Boot).

Default server: `http://localhost:8080`.

**Auth:** Register or Login sets `accessToken` and `refreshToken` via the Tests script. All other requests use Bearer `{{accessToken}}`.

**Roles:** `ROLE_CUSTOMER`, `ROLE_DRIVER`, `ROLE_RESTAURANT_OWNER`, `ROLE_ADMIN`.

request.description: Public. Generates a 6-digit OTP and logs it (SMS stub). `role`: ROLE_CUSTOMER | ROLE_DRIVER.
Public. Returns JWT tokens on success.
CUSTOMER only. Flips all others to isDefault=false.
Public. Returns banners ordered by sortOrder.
Public. Supports search, cuisineType, minRating, maxDeliveryTime filters.
Public. Top restaurants by order count.
Public. Top restaurants by average review rating.
Public. Picks the first active branch automatically.
Public. Auto-selects the first active branch.
CUSTOMER only. 409 if cart has items from a different restaurant.

body.raw:
{
  "branchId": "{{branchId}}",
  "deliveryFee": 5.00,
  "deliveryAddress": "123 Nile St, Zamalek, Cairo",
  "deliveryLat": 30.0444,
  "deliveryLng": 31.2357,
  "paymentMethod": "cash",
  "promoCode": null,
  "specialInstructions": "No onions please",
  "items": [
    {
      "menuItemId": "{{menuItemId}}",
      "qty": 2,
      "modifiers": []
    }
  ]
}

request.description: CUSTOMER only. Cart is cleared automatically after order is placed. `paymentMethod`: cash | card | wallet.
Returns orderId, status, estimatedMinutes, driverName, driverPhone, driverLat, driverLng, timeline.
CUSTOMER only. Order must be DELIVERED. Creates restaurant + driver reviews in one call.

query.description: PENDING | CONFIRMED | PREPARING | READY_FOR_PICKUP | PICKED_UP | DELIVERED | CANCELLED

request.description: Called after OTP verify with a ROLE_DRIVER token. Creates/updates DriverProfile.
DRIVER only. Returns totalTripsToday, totalEarningsToday, hoursOnline, acceptanceRate, completionRate.
DRIVER only. Returns future shifts with bookedCount and isBookedByMe.
DRIVER only. 409 if already booked or shift is full.
DRIVER only. Returns the currently assigned delivery order.
DRIVER only. Sets status to EN_ROUTE_TO_RESTAURANT.
DRIVER only. Removes driver assignment and re-queues the order. Returns 204.
DRIVER only. Sets order to READY_FOR_PICKUP. Returns 204.
DRIVER only. Marks DELIVERED, saves photo, creates DriverEarnings record. Returns 204.
DRIVER only. Sets order to CANCELLED. Returns 204.
DRIVER only. Updates Redis geo and pushes WebSocket event to /topic/orders/{orderId}/driver-location.
DRIVER only. Returns active incentives with completedTrips and isCompleted.
DRIVER only. Returns acceptanceRate, completionRate, averageRating, onTimeRate, weeklyTrend.
DRIVER only. Stub — logs request. Returns 204.
DRIVER only. Saves file to uploads/documents/{driverId}/. Status starts as 'pending'.
DRIVER only. Returns 3 hardcoded demo surge zones with polygon + multiplier.
No JWT. Send real Stripe event payload with valid Stripe-Signature for production use.
